title: Form
description: Root form definition. Metadata + which FormVersion is currently `published`. Latest published version renders at the tenant's public URL. Multiple concurrent versions supported (draft + published + archived). Handoff configuration is per-form (not per-version) so promoting a new version doesn't break the domain wiring.

slug.description: Tenant-unique slug — publishes to /forms/{slug}. Reserved: reserved / admin / preview.

kind.description: season_registration / waiver_update / medical_questionnaire / feedback_survey / trial_request / custom. Drives the default handoff + default field bundle when creating a new form.

status.description: draft / published / archived. `published` requires at least one FormVersion.status = 'published'.

published_version_id.description: The currently-live FormVersion. Null on drafts. Rollback swaps this pointer.

handoff_slug.description: Registered #[AsFormHandoff] slug — e.g. `registrations.create_registration`. Null = no handoff (feedback survey mode).

handoff_config.description: Handoff-specific configuration. For registrations.create_registration: default_season_id, default_team_id (optional), auto_stage_transitions (bool).

opens_at.description: Public URL becomes reachable at this timestamp. NULL = live immediately once published.

closes_at.description: Public URL stops accepting submissions. NULL = no auto-close.

requires_authentication.description: When true, only logged-in tenant users can submit (staff-only forms). Default false for public forms.

public_url_signature.description: Signed URL segment. Rotates on regenerate. Null until first publish.

locales_available.description: Array of BCP-47 locale codes the form supports (matches FormVersion label bundles).

branding_snapshot.description: Snapshot of tenant branding at last publish (logo, primary color, favicon). Cached so branding changes don't force every form to regenerate.

submission_count.description: Denormalized count for admin list view. Updated by FormObserver on submission events.

settings.description: Per-form settings — save_and_resume_enabled, session_ttl_hours, honeypot_field_name, redirect_url_on_success, email_notification_recipients.

x-invariants: slug tenant-unique via partial unique index.
public_url_signature globally unique + non-enumerable (>= 64 chars entropy).
handoff_slug when set MUST reference a registered #[AsFormHandoff] class (validated at write time).
opens_at < closes_at when both are set.
